name: Entity Metadata
desc: Updates an entity's DataWatcher metadata (health, skin, flags, name, etc.).
notes: S1C carries changed or new DataWatcher entries for an entity. Metadata indexes: 0=flags (onFire/sneaking/riding/sprinting/flying), 1=airTicks, 2=nameTag, 3=nameVisible, 6=health (for living), 15/variant, 16/color (for horses), etc.

implementation.overview: S1CPacketEntityMetadata updates DataWatcher entries for an entity. Contains changed metadata key-value pairs. KillAura modules read metadata to determine entity type, health, and name. For horses, metadata dictates color/type. For mobs, metadata indicates health status. Sigma 4.11 InventoryManager imports S1C to detect item changes in equipment metadata.

modules.name: KillAura Health Tracker (Rise 6.0)
modules.purpose: Read health metadata from S1C to track target entity health.
